THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: DEFENDANT, THOMAS O. BALLARD, HAVING CROSS-COMPLAINED FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS THE PREVAILING PARTY CONCERNING REAL PROPERTY, LAND AND IMPROVEMENTS, COMMONLY KNOWN AS 1369 HYDE STREET, IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AND SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFFS STATUTORY COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, AND SPECIFICALLY INCLUDING AN AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES AS AND FOR A SANCTION FOR ABUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS, IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $48,858.29, ALL AS HAS BEEN PREVIOUSLY FIXED AND DETERMINED, TOGETHER WITH INTEREST THEREON FROM THE DATE OF THAT AWARD, NOVEMBER 5, 2004, UNTIL THE DATE OF ENTRY OF THIS AMENDED JUDGMENT. THE PLAINTIFF AND EACH OF THEM SHALL TAKE NOTHING BY THEIR FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR INJUNCTIVE AND OTHER RELIEF OR BY ANY CLAIM MADE IN THAT COMPLAINT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
